prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A family tree diagram. At the top, a generic "Vehicle" card shows shared properties: "make", "model", "year", and a "start()" method. Three lines branch downward to child cards. Left: "Car" inherits all Vehicle properties and adds "numDoors" and "trunkSize". Center: "Truck" adds "payloadCapacity" and "towRating". Right: "Motorcycle" adds "engineCC" and "hasSidecar". Each child card shows inherited properties in a lighter shade and its own unique properties in bold. Small vehicle icons decorate each card. Arrows labeled "extends" connect parent to children.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
